summary: Iteration 75 tested the COMPLETE Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 feature with all 6 PDF document types (DOP, CE, Piano Controllo, Rapporto VT, Registro Saldatura, Riesame Tecnico). Fixed a syntax error in pdf_fascicolo_tecnico.py (f-string backslash issue). All 20 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SyntaxError in pdf_fascicolo_tecnico.py line 245: f-string with backslash escape 'Piano di Controllo Qualita\'' changed to use double quotes
All 6 PDF endpoints verified: dop-pdf, ce-pdf, piano-controllo-pdf, rapporto-vt-pdf, registro-saldatura-pdf, riesame-tecnico-pdf
GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns default data with 16 phases (fasi), 28 requisiti, 10 ITT items
PUT /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} saves editable data to commessa.fascicolo_tecnico
All 8 auth tests passed - all endpoints return 401 without token
All 6 PDF generation tests passed - each returns valid PDF with %PDF header
FascicoloTecnicoSection.js has DOCUMENTS array with 6 document definitions
Each document card has data-testid attributes: ft-card-{key}, btn-edit-{key}, btn-download-{key}
FascicoloTecnicoSection correctly integrated in CommessaOpsPanel with Section wrapper (count=6)

success_rate.frontend: Code verified (6 document cards, proper data-testids)

test_credentials: Test users/sessions created and cleaned up during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse created during pytest for PDF generation tests. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 completes the Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 feature with all 6 PDF types. Fixed syntax error in pdf_fascicolo_tecnico.py. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}, and 6 PDF endpoints (*-pdf). All endpoints require auth. Frontend FascicoloTecnicoSection.js renders 6 cards with Compila/PDF buttons. DEFAULT_REQUISITI has 28 items, DEFAULT_ITT has 10 items, DEFAULT_PHASES has 16 items.

get_fascicolo_default_phases.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns default data with 16 phases

get_fascicolo_default_requisiti.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns 28 default requisiti for Riesame Tecnico

put_fascicolo_editable_data.details: PUT /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} saves editable data to commessa.fascicolo_tecnico

auth_required_all_endpoints.details: All 8 fascicolo endpoints return 401 without auth token

preventivo_disegno_fields.details: POST /api/preventivi creates preventivo with numero_disegno and ingegnere_disegno fields

frontend_fascicolo_section.details: FascicoloTecnicoSection.js has 6 cards with Compila/PDF buttons and proper data-testids

frontend_edit_dialog.details: Edit dialog with document-specific fields: DopEditForm, CeEditForm, PianoEditForm, VtEditForm, RegistroEditForm, RiesameEditForm

bug_fixed.issue: SyntaxError: f-string expression part cannot include a backslash
bug_fixed.cause: Used escaped single quote in f-string: 'Piano di Controllo Qualita\''
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to double quotes: "Piano di Controllo Qualita'"
